sans.$description: Primary typeface — Public Sans (the NSW Government brand typeface) with system fallbacks. Use for all UI and body text.

mono.$description: Monospace stack — system monospace fallbacks for code, tabular data, and technical content.

12.$description: Font size 12px (0.75rem) — the step name is the px value at the default root font size.

14.$description: Font size 14px (0.875rem) — the step name is the px value at the default root font size.

16.$description: Font size 16px (1rem) — the step name is the px value at the default root font size.

18.$description: Font size 18px (1.125rem) — the step name is the px value at the default root font size.

20.$description: Font size 20px (1.25rem) — the step name is the px value at the default root font size.

24.$description: Font size 24px (1.5rem) — the step name is the px value at the default root font size.

30.$description: Font size 30px (1.875rem) — the step name is the px value at the default root font size.

36.$description: Font size 36px (2.25rem) — the step name is the px value at the default root font size.

48.$description: Font size 48px (3rem) — the step name is the px value at the default root font size.

light.$description: Light (300) — large display text only; avoid at body sizes for legibility.

medium.$description: Medium (500) — subtle emphasis, labels, and navigation.

bold.$description: Bold (700) — highest emphasis; key figures and primary headings.

tight.$description: Tight (1.25) — large headings and display text.

snug.$description: Snug (1.375) — subheadings and dense UI text.

base.$description: Base (1.5) — default for body text; meets WCAG 1.4.12 text-spacing.

loose.$description: Loose (2) — spacious text such as quotes or airy lists.

tight.$description: Tight tracking (-0.0125em) — large display headings. Value is an em multiplier; string outputs render it with the em unit.

normal.$description: Normal tracking (0em) — default for body text. Value is an em multiplier; string outputs render it with the em unit.

wide.$description: Wide tracking (0.025em) — small caps, overlines, and small labels. Value is an em multiplier; string outputs render it with the em unit.
